title: Marketplace Manager - Puma India Capital India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Puma India Capital India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Puma India Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Puma India Capital India:
Puma India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puma India Capital India!
